overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza, crossing a busy street, and continuing along a covered commercial sidewalk lined with neon signs and holographic advertisements. The scene features bright sunlight, moderate pedestrian traffic, and distinctive cyberpunk architecture with towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with food vendors and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza past a green vintage car and futuristic food kiosks

entered.detail: classic green automobile parked near the sidewalk edge
futuristic food stall with glowing blue neon trim
modern building walkway with overhead cover on the right side
yellow pedestrian bridge with large red signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit futuristic plaza with a green vintage car parked near the center. The camera moves forward past food kiosks toward a yellow overpass in the distance, with modern glass towers and holographic billboards lining the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and commercial storefronts

events.description: ego crosses the street at the crosswalk alongside a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the crosswalk with a group of pedestrians including one with purple hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair and white top walking alongside ego across the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall commercial building with prominent green 'softsys' signage and teal awnings
yellow and teal storefront with 'PAWN SHOP' neon signage
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a busy intersection where the camera approaches and crosses the street. The Softsys building dominates the left side with its teal facade, while a pawn shop appears on the right. The camera crosses the white-striped crosswalk with a group of pedestrians, moving from the open plaza into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and building overhangs

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the building overhang, creating high contrast between lit street and shaded sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the crowded sidewalk under the building overhang, passing various pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive green hair and long coat walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: glowing blue neon sign with skull logo reading 'SECURITY SOLUTION TRUST'
illuminated 'PAWN SHOP' signage in pink and blue neon

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the camera moves onto a sidewalk sheltered by a building overhang, creating dramatic shadows and mixed lighting. The pawn shop's neon signage glows brightly on the right as the camera passes various pedestrians walking in both directions. The environment feels more enclosed with the overhang blocking part of the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk approaching intersection with directional signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk approaching the Berkeley Avenue intersection, following a muscular pedestrian in a yellow and black jacket

notable_agents.action: muscular pedestrian wearing yellow and black athletic outfit with distinctive arm patterns walking ahead

entered.detail: black signpost with white arrows pointing to City Center, Pacifica, and Heywood
blue street sign reading 'Berkeley Ave' mounted on a traffic pole

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the covered sidewalk as the camera approaches an intersection marked by directional signs for City Center, Pacifica, and Heywood. The Berkeley Avenue sign becomes visible overhead. The pedestrian traffic remains moderate with various characters walking along the neon-lit storefronts, and the camera maintains a steady walking pace toward the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open futuristic plaza into the sheltered, neon-lit corridors of a dense commercial district. It begins by moving past food kiosks and a parked green vintage car toward a distant yellow overpass, flanked by towering glass buildings and holographic billboards. As the camera reaches a busy intersection, the scene shifts to a street crossing where the teal facade of the Softsys building and a local pawn shop frame the path across a white-striped crosswalk. The environment then becomes more enclosed as the camera moves under a building overhang, transitioning from bright sunlight into dramatic shadows and the glow of neon signage. Finally, the walk continues along this covered sidewalk past various pedestrians, moving steadily toward an intersection marked by overhead directional signs for City Center, Pacifica, and Heywood.
